x-note: datamancer.dev is the practitioner's identity card — there is no MCP server here. The grimoire MCP lives at datamancy.dev: a cryptographically verifiable static MCP serving the datamancy grimoire as raw markdown, manifest signed with ECDSA P-256, consumed via `npx -y datamancy`. This card is one of three independent channels publishing the pinned public-key fingerprint (the others: the npm package source, and a DNS TXT record at _datamancy-key.datamancer.dev) — cross-check all three before trusting an install. Three domains, three purposes: chronicle (algebraic-intelligence.dev) / identity (datamancer.dev) / grimoire (datamancy.dev).

x-recommended-resources.name: datamancy-mcp-manifest
x-recommended-resources.description: The ECDSA P-256-signed MCP manifest. Each spell is SHA-256-verifiable against it; the detached signature is at /.well-known/mcp/manifest.json.sig.

x-recommended-resources.name: datamancy-npm-package
x-recommended-resources.description: Zero-dependency MCP adapter. Pins the public key in source. Invoke via `npx -y datamancy`.

x-recommended-resources.name: datamancer-identity-card
x-recommended-resources.description: The practitioner's identity card. Bare markdown.
